title: DLC Manager - Emoji Pack
description: This is a resource pack that adds emojis to the text within the DLC Manager mod.
body:
### Introduction
This is a simple resourcepack that adds emojis to the DLC pages of the DLC Manager mod, making them more visually appealing and improving their readability.
### Dependencies
This resourcepack depends on [DLC Manager](https://modrinth.com/mod/dlc-manager) and [Modern UI](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-ui).
